value.found_quote: Imagen is Google's high-fidelity image generation model, capable of generating realistic and high quality images from text prompts.
value.rationale: The page directly substantiates the claim that Google offers Imagen as a high-fidelity text-to-image generation model producing realistic and high quality images from text prompts — the language is nearly verbatim. However, the page also clearly states that Imagen is deprecated and will be shut down on August 17, 2026, with a migration path to "Nano Banana" (gemini-2.5-flash-image). Since the model is deprecated but still operational until the shutdown date, the lifecycle status is 'deprecated'.
